title: WHERE clause erroneously influences value of fetched column from view
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, '1e500', 3.14);
CREATE VIEW v1(c1) AS SELECT LOWER(CAST(c2 AS CHAR)) FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (2, NULL, NULL);
SELECT v1.c1 FROM v1 JOIN t1 ON t1.c1 NOT IN (1, 2, v1.c1);
key_bug_features: WHERE clause affects fetched column value from view
